short_description: A combination of raspberry, lemon and lime for a fruity ball of flavor.
description:
Key Features

  • A taste of raspberry, lemon and lime
  • Customize your nicotine dose
  • Nicotine infused cotton
  • Tobacco-free nicotine alternative


Explore Cotton Mouth Blue Lemon

Cotton Mouth Blue Lemon is a nicotine-infused product made with synthetic nicotine and features a blend of lemon, lime, and raspberry flavors. As a cotton-based product, it provides a regular-strength option, with each nicotine ball containing approximately 1mg of nicotine (9mg/g). One portion consists of about six balls, delivering approximately 6mg of nicotine.


Cotton Mouth Overview

Cotton Mouth is a brand  that provides new and innovative nicotine products. They offer flavorful, customizable and perhaps the most impactful oral nicotine solution on the market.
ingredient_list: Propylene glycol, polyester substrate, vegetable glycerin, water, food grade natural & artificial flavoring, triacetin, nicotine, sucralose.
product_characteristics: Contains Artificial Sweetners,Contains Flavoring,Contains Nicotine,Gluten Free

name: On! Citrus 4mg
short_description: On! Citrus 4mg nicotine pouches offer a citrus flavor and contain 4mg of nicotine per pouch.
description:
Key Features

  • Citrus flavored nicotine pouches with a fresh, bright taste
  • Mini format
  • Tobacco leaf-free pouches
  • 20 nicotine pouches per can

 

Explore On! Citrus 4mg Nicotine Pouches

On! Citrus 4mg nicotine pouches are offered by On!, a recognized brand in the U.S. nicotine pouch market. These pouches feature a citrus flavor and come in a mini, dry format with a nicotine strength of 4mg. Each can includes 20 tobacco leaf-free pouches, available for individual purchase or in packs of 5, 10, 25, or 50 through Nicokick.

 

On! Overview

On! nicotine pouches are available in three different nicotine strengths and seven varieties. Designed for adults aged 21 and older, these pouches provide a tobacco leaf-free alternative to traditional tobacco products.
ingredient_list: Nicotine Bitartrate Dihydrate, Microcrystalline Cellulose, Flavors, Sodium Carbonates, Binders.
